aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic foundation for AEO with some structured content and service information but lacks depth in content, reviews, and local SEO signals.
quick_wins: Add customer reviews to the website and encourage reviews on Google My Business.
Expand service pages with detailed content, FAQs, and targeted keywords.
Implement local business schema to better highlight location and services.

gbp_analysis.found: No Google Business Profile (GBP) information was found on the website or through a quick search.
gbp_analysis.summary: The absence of a GBP significantly impacts local search visibility and customer trust.
critical_issues: No GBP listing found, leading to missed local search opportunities.
Lack of customer reviews and engagement on a GBP platform.

nap_citations.summary: The business name, address, and phone number (NAP) are not prominently displayed or consistent across the website and external directories.
action_items: Ensure NAP is consistent across the website, footer, and contact page.
List the business in local directories and ensure NAP consistency in all listings.
Add a map embed or location details to improve local signals.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of localized and detailed content for HVAC and masonry services.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for specific HVAC services or local masonry solutions in Baltimore.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Creating dedicated service pages with location-based keywords and detailed descriptions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Establishing the business as a local authority by publishing blog posts, guides, and customer testimonials.
